description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a mix of black and white exterior walls and a flat, slightly notched roof. The front facade includes a covered carport with a yellow car, a balcony with a metal railing, and large, multi-pane windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The side and rear elevations display a combination of tall, narrow windows and larger bay windows, some with visible curtains and flower boxes. A small fenced garden area is present adjacent to the carport, adding greenery to the urban setting. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level featuring a prominent bay window and balcony overlooking the street. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with black and white walls, large windows, a flat roof, a balcony, and a covered carport with a small garden area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with a yellow car, balcony with railing, large windows, and a small garden area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white wall, bay window, balcony, and multiple tall windows with visible curtains.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain white wall and several tall, narrow windows arranged in two rows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing black walls, a single window, and the angular shape of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay windows and tall vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered carport, balcony above, and a modern door with adjacent lighting and railing.
